title: In production, which file actually gets loaded?
summary: Google for Developers poses a question about which package file gets loaded in production when the same application code uses a package name but exhibits different behavior after deployment. The video explores module resolution and package import behavior differences between development and production environments.
writeup: The video examines why identical application code referencing the same package name can resolve to different files and behave differently once deployed. It walks through module resolution and package import behavior, contrasting how imports get resolved in development versus production. The core takeaway is that the file actually loaded in production may not match the one loaded locally, with edge deployment as a context where these resolution differences surface.
